title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.255 - Assets, how invested
text:
379.255.  Assets, how invested. — No such company shall invest any of its assets except in accordance with the laws of this state relating to the investment of the assets of domestic stock companies transacting the same kinds of insurance.
(RSMo 1939 § 5960) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5849; 1919 § 6259
